info.title: PhonePe Payment Gateway API
info.description: API Documentation for PhonePe Payment Integration

post.description: Authenticate a user and return a JWT token.
Log out the user by invalidating the JWT token.
Register a new user with a specific role. This endpoint is restricted to Admin users only.
Set a new password for a newly created user account.
Create a pending payment record and return a local shareable link.

get.description: Look up the payment and redirect the user to PhonePe checkout.

302.description: Redirect to PhonePe checkout or frontend status page (if already processed or errored). Redirection URL include query params like orderId, status, and error.

post.description: Handles PhonePe browser redirect after payment. Performs a server-to-server status verification, updates the DB, then redirects the frontend to /payment/status with query params: orderId, status (COMPLETED|PENDING|DECLINED|CANCELLED|ERROR), amount, transactionId, paidAt. On failure, an extra `error` param is included and status defaults to PENDING.

302.description: Redirect to {FRONTEND_URL}/payment/status with query params: orderId, status (COMPLETED|PENDING|DECLINED|CANCELLED|ERROR), amount, transactionId, paidAt.

response.description: Base64 encoded payload containing transaction details like merchantOrderId, amount, and state.

400.description: Invalid webhook payload - order ID missing

get.description: Manually check and sync payment status from PhonePe.
Return a paginated list of all payment records. Supports search, status filtering, date range filtering, and pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by order ID, name, email, phone, or transaction ID

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by payment status (e.g., INIT, COMPLETED, PENDING, DECLINED, CANCELLED)

get.description: Fetch complete details of a specific payment transaction using its merchant order ID.
Fetch all available user roles with their labels.
Fetch the authenticated user's profile details.

post.description: Update the authenticated user's name, email, or phone.

400.description: Validation error or incorrect old password

post.description: Upload and optimize (convert to WebP) user profile image.

422.description: Validation error - Image must be jpeg, png, jpg, or webp and <= 2MB
